name: Non-Working Days
tagline: Check working, non-working, short, and holiday days
description: Determine whether a specific date, month, year, or custom date range is a working day, non-working day, shortened workday, or public holiday, with support for country code, six-day work weeks, and COVID-era exceptions.

auth.hint: isDayOff() is a free public API and requires no registration, API key, or authentication.

tools.name: get_day_status
tools.description: Get the working/non-working/short/holiday status for one specific date.

params.name: date
params.description: Date in YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYMMDD, or YY-MM-DD format.

params.name: pre
params.description: Whether to account for shortened pre-holiday days: 0 (default, ignore) or 1 (mark shortened days with response code 2).

params.name: sd
params.description: Work-week length: 0 for a five-day week (default) or 1 for a six-day week.

params.name: covid
params.description: Whether to apply special COVID-19 non-working decrees: 0 (default, ignore) or 1 (apply and mark with response code 4).

params.name: holiday
params.description: Whether to flag public holidays distinctly: 0 (default) or 1 (mark holidays with response code 8).

tools.name: get_period_data
tools.description: Get day-status data for a specific day, month, year, or an arbitrary date range of up to 366 days.

params.name: year
params.description: Year in YYYY format; required unless date1/date2 are used.

params.name: month
params.description: Month in MM format, used together with year.

params.name: day
params.description: Day in DD format, used together with year and month.

params.name: date1
params.description: Range start date in YYYYMMDD format; used together with date2 instead of year/month/day.

params.name: date2
params.description: Range end date in YYYYMMDD format; the range may span at most 366 days.

params.name: pre
params.description: Whether to account for shortened pre-holiday days: 0 (default) or 1.

params.name: sd
params.description: Work-week length: 0 for a five-day week (default) or 1 for a six-day week.

params.name: covid
params.description: Whether to apply special COVID-19 non-working decrees: 0 (default) or 1.

params.name: delimeter
params.description: Delimiter string (up to 7 characters) between day codes in the output; empty by default.

tools.name: check_leap_year
tools.description: Check whether a given year is a leap year.
